question.label: Fragmented calendar
question.name: Calendar is still fragmented — what's chopping it up most?
question.description: Drills into the specific source of the calendar fragmentation so the manager can see what is creating day-to-day friction.

answer: A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.

assessment.note: Firefighting and context switching point to reactive work disrupting focus, a mild negative clarity signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] concrete friction thread on firefighting/context switching not followed because drill cap requires stage advance.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Trade-offs now
new_queue.name: What are you choosing to say no to this week?

new_queue.label: Visible ownership
new_queue.name: Where do you want more visible ownership on the frontend work?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually help this fortnight?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
